error_signature: Your Slack credential is missing required Oauth Scopes
title: Missing 'search:read' scope in Slack OAuth2 credentials
symptom: When attempting to use Slack credentials, n8n throws an error indicating that required OAuth scopes are missing. Specifically, it mentions the 'search:read' scope is not included.
applies_when: Attempting to perform actions that require 'search:read' scope
not_this_if: The required scope is already included in the OAuth credentials
root_cause: The default set of scopes for Slack OAuth2 credentials in n8n did not include the 'search:read' scope, which is necessary for searching messages. This omission can lead to errors when workflows attempt to use this functionality.
fix_steps: Check the current version of n8n to ensure it includes the fix for the missing scope.
If on an outdated version, follow the documentation to update your n8n cloud instance.
agent_instruction: Ensure your n8n instance is updated to the latest version to include the 'search:read' scope in Slack OAuth2 credentials.
